zh.lifeSummary: 當Ellin Milnes於大約1570年出生在英國藍卡爾福利斯頓時，她的父親Edwarde Milnes21歲，母親Ellen21歲。她於大約1587年與Raphe Royle II在英國爾諾特登結婚。他們至少是6個兒子的父母。她於1623年住在英國爾諾特登。她去世於1617年11月在英國藍卡爾福利斯頓享年48歲，埋葬在英國藍卡爾福利斯頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ellin Milnes于大约1570年出生在英国藍卡爾福利斯頓时，她的父亲Edwarde Milnes21岁，母亲Ellen21岁。她于大约1587年与Raphe Royle II在英国爾諾特登结婚。他们至少是6个儿子的父母。她于1623年住在英国爾諾特登。她去世于1617年11月在英国藍卡爾福利斯頓享年48岁，埋葬在英国藍卡爾福利斯頓。

nameMeanings.name: Milnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Lancashire): variant of Milne , with post-medieval excrescent -s. Compare Mills .

variants.name: Milne
meanings: Scottish (mainly Aberdeenshire and Angus): occupational name from Middle English milne ‘mill’, also found as mulne in south and western England and melne in southeastern England. The Scottish name has been established in Ireland since the early 18th century, and has absorbed some cases of Irish Moyle . Compare Mill 1.

nameMeanings.name: Ellin
meanings: Some consider this the same as Helen, and indeed in Spanish Helen and Ellen are both represented by Elena. A correspondent of Notes and Queries says the name Ellen has no possible connexion with Helen, which is older by a thousand years at least, and that Ellen is the feminine of Alain, Alan, or Allan. It may, however, be the same as Ailean. Ellin, another spelling of Ellen.

variants.name: Helen
meanings: vernacular form of the name (Greek Hēlēnē) borne in classical legend by a famous beauty, wife of Menelaus, whose seizure by the Trojan prince Paris sparked off the Trojan War. Her name is of uncertain origin; it may be connected with a word meaning ‘ray’ or ‘sunbeam’ compare Greek hēlios ‘sun’. It has sometimes been taken as connected with the Greek word meaning ‘Greek’, Hellēn, but this is doubtful. In the early Christian period the name was borne by the mother of the Emperor Constantine, who is now usually known by the Latin version of her name, Helena. She is credited with having found the True Cross in Jerusalem. She was born in about 248 , probably in Bithynia. However, in medieval England it was believed that she had been born in Britain, which greatly increased the popularity of the name there.

variants.name: Elena
meanings: form of   Helen  , now used quite frequently in the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When Ellin Milnes was born about 1570, in Flixton, Lancashire, England, her father, Edwarde Milnes, was 21 and her mother, Ellen, was 21. She married Raphe Royle II about 1587, in Northenden, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons. She lived in Northenden, Cheshire, England in 1623. She died in November 1617, in Flixton, Lancashire, England, at the age of 48, and was buried in Flixton, Lancashire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ellin Milnes est née environ 1570, à Flixton, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Edwarde Milnes, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Ellen, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Raphe Royle II environ 1587, à Northenden, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils. Elle a vécu à Northenden, Cheshire, Angleterre en 1623. Elle est décédée en novembre 1617, à Flixton, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 48 ans, et a été enterrée à Flixton, Lancashire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ellin Milnes um 1570 in Flixton, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Edwarde Milnes 21 und ihre Mutter Ellen 21. Sie hat um 1587 in Northenden, Cheshire, England Raphe Royle II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne. 1623 hat sie in Northenden, Cheshire, England gelebt. Sie starb im November 1617 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Flixton, Lancashire, England und wurde in Flixton, Lancashire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ellin Milnes è nata il circa 1570 nel Flixton, Lancashire, England, sua padre, Edwarde Milnes, aveva 21 anni e sua madre, Ellen, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Raphe Royle II circa 1587, nel Northenden, Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli. Vissuto a Northenden, Cheshire, England nel 1623. Morì nel novembre 1617, nel Flixton, Lancashire, England, all'età di 48 anni, e fu sepolta a Flixton, Lancashire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Ellin Milnesが約1570年にイギリスランカシュアイアフリクストンで生まれた時，父Edwarde Milnesは21歳，母Ellenは21歳であった。約1587年にイギリスチェシュアイアノースエンデンでRaphe Royle IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子の親であった。彼女は1623年にはイギリスチェシュアイアノースエンデンに住んでいた。彼女は1617年11月にイギリスランカシュアイアフリクストンで48歳で死去し，イギリスランカシュアイアフリクストンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ellin Milnes(이)가 대략 1570년 영국 랭카실르 플릭스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Edwarde Milnes(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ellen(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 대략 1587년 영국 체실르 노르테든에서 Raphe Royle II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 1623년도에 영국 체실르 노르테든에서 살았다. 그녀는 1617년 11월 영국 랭카실르 플릭스턴에서 48세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 랭카실르 플릭스턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ellin Milnes nasceu aproximadamente 1570, em Flixton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Edwarde Milnes, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Ellen, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Raphe Royle II aproximadamente 1587, em Northenden, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos. Ela viveu em Northenden, Cheshire, Inglaterra em 1623. Ela faleceu em novembro de 1617, em Flixton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 48 anos, e foi sepultada em Flixton, Lancashire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ellin Milnes родилась около 1570 г. в местности фликстон, ланкашир, Англия, её отцу по имени Edwarde Milnes было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Ellen, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Raphe Royle II около 1587 г. в местности нортенден, чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей. Она жила в местности нортенден, чешир, Англия в 1623 году. Она умерла ноябрь 1617 г. в местности фликстон, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 48 лет и была похоронена в местности фликстон, ланкашир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ellin Milnes nació aproximadamente 1570, en Flixton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Edwarde Milnes, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Ellen, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Raphe Royle II aproximadamente 1587, en Northenden, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos. Vivió en Northenden, Cheshire, Inglaterra en 1623. Murió en noviembre de 1617, en Flixton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 48 años, y fue sepultada en Flixton, Lancashire, Inglaterra.
